pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py geometric bounds checking (with 0.01 tolerance)
task description and verifier.py geometric bounds checking (with 0.01 tolerance)
task description and verifier.py mathematical consistency validation

privileged_info_summary: The task operates in a synthetic CoppeliaSim environment and requires programmatic trajectory generation. The agent must implement a rectangular path spanning at least 0.15m in X and 0.10m in Y, generating a high-frequency log with a minimum of 100 rows. The flow rate constant is strictly verified mathematically to be 5.0 mL/m relative to instantaneous velocity. Output paths are correctly identified as /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dispensing_profile.csv and /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/dispensing_report.json.
